sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FBI Busts $25M Crypto Fraud Ring: 18 Charged In 'Operation Token Mirrors' Involving Fake Token NexFundAI

The operation, dubbed "Operation Token Mirrors," led to the arrest of three individuals in Texas, the UK, and Portugal.
